description: Global overview showing distribution shape and major groups.

strategies.technique: Convex hull outlines around clusters (d3.polygonHull); hide individual nodes
strategies.rationale: Reduces visual noise by showing group boundaries and spatial extent.

strategies.technique: Simplify paths via Visvalingam-Whyatt (topojson.simplify); remove sub-pixel details
strategies.rationale: Prevents aliasing artifacts and rendering lag from invisible geometry.

strategies.technique: Render marks as pixels; suppress labels and edges; show only aggregate statistics
Reveal text labels using d3.quadtree collision detection; hide overlapping labels
strategies.rationale: Ensures legibility by dynamically filtering annotations based on screen space.

strategies.technique: Transition links from straight lines to curved Bezier paths with increased opacity
strategies.rationale: Reveals edge relationships suppressed at overview to reduce clutter.

strategies.technique: Keep axis formatting as Year or Month ('%Y' / '%b %Y')
strategies.rationale: Temporal granularity matches visible time window.

description: Full individual-item detail with rich interaction.

strategies.rendering: Switch from Canvas back to SVG for full event listeners (click, hover)
strategies.rationale: Performance is prioritized at overview (Canvas); interactivity at detail (SVG).

strategies.technique: Show individual data labels and detailed tooltips
strategies.rationale: User is inspecting specific items; full detail is warranted.

strategies.technique: Switch axis formatting to full DateTime ('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')
strategies.rationale: Provides appropriate temporal precision for the zoomed-in time window.

strategies.technique: Replace placeholder thumbnails with full-resolution images via IntersectionObserver
strategies.rationale: Lazy-loads rich media only when large enough to be perceived.

strategies.navigation: Render minimap/overview+detail highlighting current zoom extent
strategies.rationale: Mitigates 'Desert Fog' problem where users lose global position.

strategies.technique: Temporarily hide edges and labels while d3.event.transform is changing; restore on debounced end
Define zoom.scaleExtent([0.5, 20]) and translateExtent matching data bounding box
strategies.rationale: Prevents disorientation from panning into whitespace or over-zooming.
